About Me
💻
Currently at
LPU · B.Tech CSE
React / Next.js90%
Node / Express85%
MongoDB / SQL82%
C++ / DSA88%

I enjoy building web applications and understanding the systems that power them behind the scenes. My work focuses on creating solutions where functionality, structure, and user experience come together smoothly. The process of transforming an idea into a working product is something I find both challenging and rewarding.

My interest in this field began with a curiosity about how websites and applications actually function. While exploring and experimenting with code, I gradually developed a deeper understanding of how different components of a system interact. Over time, this curiosity evolved into a strong interest in designing and building complete applications.

What motivates me most is the opportunity to solve problems and continuously improve the way software is built. I enjoy analyzing challenges, thinking through logical solutions, and refining ideas until they become efficient and reliable. For me, development is a continuous process of learning, building, and improving.
